raw.message: In need of styling inspo? We’ve got you covered ✨ #stylinginspo #style #ootd #newin

hook.summary: Fast-paced fashion lookbook featuring multiple outfit transitions.
hook.visual_action: A woman stands in a minimalist room, snapping through several distinct autumn/winter outfits in front of a large plant.

scene_flow: Model poses in a layered green sweater and brown trousers with a beige blazer.
Quick cut to a blue sweater paired with a brown suede midi skirt.
Transition to a casual denim look with a brown jacket and red sweater draped over shoulders.
Model turns to show a pink vest and patterned skirt ensemble.
Final shot of the model walking out of frame in the initial green and brown outfit.
audience_proxy: Women aged 25-45 interested in minimalist fashion and capsule wardrobe inspiration.
